info.description: Dotnet tool for code generation, powered by OpenAPI.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Verbose mode

options.name: --generator-name
options.description: Generator to use (see langs command for list).

options.name: --output
options.description: Where to write the generated files (current dir by default)

options.name: --input-specification
options.description: Location of the OpenAPI spec, as URL or file (required)

options.name: --template-dir
options.description: Folder containing the template files

options.name: --auth
options.description: Adds authorization headers when fetching the OpenAPI definitions remotely.Pass in a URL-encoded string of name:header with a comma separating multiple values

options.name: --config-file
options.description: Path to json configuration file.File content should be in a json format {"optionKey":"optionValue", "optionKey1":"optionValue1"...}Supported options can be different for each language. Run config-help -g {generator name} command for language specific config options.

options.name: --skip-overwrite
options.description: Specifies if the existing files should be overwritten during the generation.

options.name: --api-package
options.description: package for generated api classes

options.name: --model-package
options.description: package for generated models

options.name: --model-name-prefix
options.description: Prefix that will be prepended to all model names. Default is the empty string.

options.name: --model-name-suffix
options.description: Suffix that will be appended to all model names. Default is the empty string.

options.name: --instantiation-types
options.description: Sets instantiation type mappings in the format of type=instantiatedType,type=instantiatedType.For example (in Java): array=ArrayList,map=HashMap. In other words array types will get instantiated as ArrayList in generated code. You can also have multiple occurrences of this option.

options.name: --type-mapping
options.description: Sets mappings between OpenAPI spec types and generated code types in the format of OpenaAPIType=generatedType,OpenAPIType=generatedType. For example: array=List,map=Map,string=String. You can also have multiple occurrences of this option.

options.name: --additional-properties
options.description: Sets additional properties that can be referenced by the mustache templates in the format of name=value,name=value. You can also have multiple occurrences of this option.

options.name: --language-specific-primitives
options.description: Specifies additional language specific primitive types in the format of type1,type2,type3,type3. For example: String,boolean,Boolean,Double. You can also have multiple occurrences of this option.

options.name: --import-mapping
options.description: Specifies mappings between a given class and the import that should be used for that class in the format of type=import,type=import. You can also have multiple occurrences of this option.

options.name: --system-properties
options.description: Sets specified system properties in the format of name=value,name=value (or multiple options, each with name=value).

options.name: --invoker-package
options.description: root package for generated code

options.name: --group-id
options.description: groupId in generated pom.xml

options.name: --artifact-id
options.description: artifactId in generated pom.xml

options.name: --artifact-version
options.description: artifact version in generated pom.xml

options.name: --library
options.description: library template (sub-template)

options.name: --git-user-id
options.description: Git user ID, e.g. openapitools.

options.name: --git-repository-id
options.description: Git repo ID, e.g. openapi-generator.

options.name: --release-notes
options.description: Release note, default to 'Minor update'.

options.name: --http-user-agent
options.description: HTTP user agent, e.g. codegen_csharp_api_client, default to 'OpenAPI-Generator/{packageVersion}}/{language}'

options.name: --reserved-words-mapping
options.description: Specifies how a reserved name should be escaped to. Otherwise, the default _<name> is used. For example id=identifier. You can also have multiple occurrences of this option.

options.name: --ignore-file-override
options.description: Specifies an override location for the .openapi-generator-ignore file. Most useful on initial generation.

options.name: --remove-operation-id-prefix
options.description: Remove prefix of operationId, e.g. config_getId => getId

options.name: --skip-validate-specification
options.description: Skips the default behavior of validating an input specification.

options.name: --enable-post-process-file
options.description: Enable post-processing file using environment variables.

options.name: --generate-alias-as-model
options.description: Generate alias to map, array as models

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Do not print any output to the console.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information
